title: Cross Shipment
subtitle: Small orders from many origins, consolidated into one container

explainer.p1: At special request, selected green coffees can be ordered in small quantities inside one combined, mixed container of different single origins — to be used as a blend. Each roasting company can create its own signature blend and particular image.
explainer.p2: We usually ship such a mixed container from Europe, allowing you to reduce the stock you hold of each single origin — less capital tied up, one consolidated delivery.

request.title: Request a mixed container
request.subtitle: Tell us your route, your contact details, and up to five origin line items — we'll come back with a consolidation plan.

form.success: Request received — we'll come back with a consolidation plan and quote.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.email: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.phone: Enter a valid phone (numbers only, 7+ digits).
